name: Enoch.Wiki — The Ethiopian Bible, corroborated
description: A rigorously corroborated knowledge resource for the Ethiopian Orthodox Bible — 1 Enoch, Jubilees, Meqabyan, 4 Baruch, and the canonical gospels. Every claim is sourced, perspective-tagged, and credibility-scored.

shortcuts.description: Why the Ethiopian Bible contains a book most Christians have never read

shortcuts.description: Canonical accounts, historical claims, and contested traditions
